Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait per case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time required to complete Accepted + Wait after its initiation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Time from Accepted + In Progress to Accepted + Wait
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - User occurs

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation occurs

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - Vendor
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor occurs

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - Customer
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - Customer occurs

Name: Time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Accepted + Wait
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Time from Accepted + Assigned to Accepted + Wait
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Wait and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time until Accepted + Wait is performed after case start
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait in variants that include Completed + In Call versus variants that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Impact of Accepted + Wait duration on the total resolution time of cases ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time between consecutive occurrences of Accepted + Wait within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait in high-impact versus low-impact incidents
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case grouped by the last value of impact

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait to case closure (Completed + Closed)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Closed'
